blended.narrative: Whitewater is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,904 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
